node.text: Nate won his fourth video game tournament online and is proud to make money doing what he loves.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "video games play") on Observation (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Nate won an international tournament in gaming, turning his passion into a career.

node.text: Nate usually plays CS:GO but participated in a local Street Fighter tournament and discovered he is really good at it.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "video games play") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Nate's focus has been on gaming, practicing a lot and winning tournaments, including winning his second tournament last week.

node.text: Nate won a really big video game tournament last week and made a lot of money from it.

node.text: Nate mentions he likes winning recognition in video game tournaments and compares it to Joanna's recognition.
